LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR JAVIER PULIDO). THE COURT MAKES A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE. THERE BEING NO OBJECTIONS, THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: MOTION WITH BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR JAVIER PULIDO IS GRANTED. COUNSEL TO INFORM THE PLAINTIFF OF THE COURT'S DISCLOSURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: AARON COLBY, ZOE YUZNA AND CHRISTIAN S. MAZZA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR JAVIER PULIDO)

Appearances via Zoom:
Zoe Yuzna of the Colby Law Firm (818.253.1599, zoe@colbylegal.com) counsel for plaintiff Javier Pulido;
Michelle Barnes of O'Hagan & Meyer LLP (415.578.6900, mbarnes@ohaganmeyer.com) counsel for defendant San Francisco Trial Lawyers Association.

The court makes a personal disclosure. There being no objections, the court rules as follows: motion with be relieved as counsel for Javier Pulido is granted. Counsel to inform the plaintiff of the court's disclosure. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
